Edexcel.title: Key concepts in chemistry, Groups of the Periodic Table, Rates of reaction, Fuels, Heat energy changes in chemical reactions, Earth and atmospheric science

notes.trilogyVsTriple: Combined Science Trilogy covers approximately 70% of each separate science. Students receive a double grade (e.g. 6-6, 7-7).
notes.requiredPracticals: 21 required practicals across the three sciences. Questions on these appear in the written exams.
notes.mathsSkills: Students need maths skills including: calculating means, using SI units, understanding significant figures, using percentages, plotting graphs, using equations, rearranging formulae.
notes.workingScientifically: All exam boards assess Working Scientifically skills including: experimental design, data analysis, evaluating methods, understanding variables, identifying risks, drawing conclusions.
